channel.title: AI & Tech News Aggregator
channel.description: Aggregated AI and Tech news from 11 sources

item.title: 8点1氪丨马斯克在对OpenAI的诉讼中寻求罢免奥特曼职位；宁德时代聘请紫金矿业创始人陈景河；产业链人士：苹果首款折叠屏手机项目正常推进，产品下半年发布
item.description:
[36氪] 今日热点导览
海康威视回应辟谣“监控系统出现漏洞，300多人被带走” 郭艾伦否认被骗千万 日本餐饮巨头食其家创始人心梗去世 产业链人士：苹果首款折叠屏手机项目正常推进 宇树科技移动机器人新专利获授权
TOP 3大新闻 嫣然天使儿童医院发文感谢陈光标捐赠1000万 4月7日，“北京嫣然天使儿童医院体检中心”官方账号发文感谢陈光标对嫣然医院的支持，并发布了颁发给陈光标的感谢证书。证书内文写到：感谢您对北京嫣然天使儿童医院的大力支持。因为你们的帮助，更多的孩子在这里重建笑容。我们坚信，唯有怀抱着善良与爱，才能在公益之路上勇敢前行！4月5日，陈光标

item.title: Elon Musk seeks removal of OpenAI CEO Sam Altman as trial looms
item.description: [Straits Times] Mr Musk is suing OpenAI and Microsoft over claims that the ChatGPT maker abandoned its founding mission.

item.title: 【钛晨报】李强签署国务院令，公布《国务院关于产业链供应链安全的规定》；中国央行连续第17个月增持黄金；“GPT-4o之母”宣布离职OpenAI
item.description: [钛媒体] 宁德时代聘请紫金矿业创始人陈景河；实探家电涨价传闻虚实：尚未开启调价，但多位销售均称“接下来要涨”；美团、京东收紧外部AI使用权限；360最新发现OpenClaw三大漏洞，涉1个高危、2个中危；英特尔：加入与SpaceX、xAI和特斯拉合作的Terafab项目；全国服务业大会召开在即，推动服务业扩能提质举措将推出；高盛策略师：当前科技股估值带来投资机会；全球加速布局太空算力，天地协同的算力网络也将加速构建

item.title: Intel joins Elon Musk’s Terafab AI chip project to power humanoid, data centre goals
item.description: [Straits Times] The chipmaker will help make processors powering the tech billionaire’s robotics and data centre ambitions.

item.title: US stocks close mixed, with signs of progress as Trump’s Iran deadline draws near
item.description: [Straits Times] Dow Jones fell 0.18 per cent, while the S&P 500 and Nasdaq gained 0.08 per cent and 0.1 per cent, respectively.

item.title: I can’t help rooting for tiny open source AI model maker Arcee
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Arcee is a tiny 26-person U.S. startup that built a high-performing, massive, open source LLM. And it's gaining popularity with OpenClaw users.

item.title: Spotify’s Prompted Playlists can help you find new podcasts to listen to
item.description: [The Verge AI] On Tuesday, Spotify expanded its Prompted Playlists feature to include podcasts, an update that could make it easier for Premium users to find new shows to listen to. Prompted Playlists were originally launched as a beta feature in December, but previously only worked for music. You can use the feat

item.title: PIMCO weighs $14 billion debt deal for Oracle's Michigan data center, Bloomberg News reports
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Anthropic Teams Up With Its Rivals to Keep AI From Hacking Everything
item.description: [WIRED AI] The AI lab's Project Glasswing will bring together Apple, Google, and more than 45 other organizations. They'll use the new Claude Mythos Preview model to test advancing AI cybersecurity capabilities.

item.title: Firmus, the ‘Southgate’ AI data center builder backed by Nvidia, hits $5.5B valuation
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Nvidia-backed Asia AI data center provider Firmus has now raised $1.35 billion in six months.

item.title: Indian billionaire Gautam Adani will seek to dismiss US SEC fraud case
item.description: [Straits Times] The Adanis' lawyers said their clients disputed there was any credible evidence supporting the alleged bribery scheme.

item.title: Intel signs on to Elon Musk’s Terafab chips project
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Intel will join SpaceX and Tesla in an effort to build a new U.S. semiconductor factory in Texas, although the scope of its contributions are unclear.

item.title: Anthropic touts AI cybersecurity project with Big Tech partners
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Anthropic debuts preview of powerful new AI model Mythos in new cybersecurity initiative
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] The new model will be used by a small number of high-profile companies to engage in defensive cybersecurity work.

item.title: A new Anthropic model found security problems ‘in every major operating system and web browser’
item.description: [The Verge AI] Anthropic is debuting a new AI model as part of a cybersecurity partnership with Nvidia, Google, Amazon Web Services, Apple, Microsoft, and other companies. Project Glasswing, as it's called, is billed as a way for large companies, and potentially even the government, to flag vulnerabilities in thei

item.title: Hyundai resuming new Palisade SUV sales after finalizing fix
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Uber is the latest to be won over by Amazon’s AI chips
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Uber is expanding its AWS contract to run more of its ride-sharing features on Amazon's chips. This is a thumb-of-the nose at Oracle and Google.

item.title: AI content can rank, but quality still decides winners
item.description: [MarTech] Semrush’s study shows AI content is already competing in search, but performance still comes down to execution, not the tool. The post AI content can rank, but quality still decides winners appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: Suno and major music labels reportedly clash over AI music sharing
item.description: [The Verge AI] The AI-powered musicmaker Suno is struggling to reach licensing deals with Universal Music Group and Sony Music Entertainment. That's according to a report from the Financial Times, which says both sides can't agree on whether users should be able to share the AI-generated songs they create. "Univer

item.title: Anthropic ups compute deal with Google and Broadcom amid skyrocketing demand
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Anthropic bulked up its compute deal with Google and Broadcom as the company has seen its run-rate revenue surge to $30 billion.

item.title: Intel will help build Elon Musk’s Terafab AI chip factory
item.description: [The Verge AI] Elon Musk's Terafab AI chip project in Austin, Texas, is gaining a crucial new partner: Intel. On Tuesday, the American chipmaker announced it was signing on to help design and build the sprawling facility, which would supply AI chips to Musk's two companies, SpaceX (newly merged with xAI) and Tesla

item.title: Ex-Meta worker investigated for downloading 30,000 private Facebook photos
item.description: [BBC Technology] The former employee was fired from Meta after being suspected of downloading 30,000 photos, the company said.

item.title: Anthropic tops US$30 billion run rate, seals deal with Broadcom
item.description: [Business Times] More than 1,000 business customers spend over US$1 million annually on Claude services

item.title: Intel joins Musk's Terafab AI chip project to power humanoid, data center goals
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: 美国AI三巨头围剿模型蒸馏，中国公司终要大考
item.description: [钛媒体] 是封锁，更是警醒；是危机，更是转机。

item.title: Snap Insight: Singapore’s S$1b support package amid Middle East conflict is more than a short-term relief
item.description: [CNA Tech] The latest support package is a signal that the government is prepared to move before cost pressures spread more widely through the economy, says Nanyang Technological University’s Chua Yeow Hwee.

item.title: Using AI isn’t the same as getting value from it
item.description: [MarTech] Most teams have access to AI, but still struggle to see meaningful results. The issue isn’t the tools, but where they’re applied. The post Using AI isn’t the same as getting value from it appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: Uber bets on Amazon's custom chips to boost AI efforts
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: OpenAI encourages firms to trial four-day weeks to adapt to AI era
item.description: [BBC Technology] The ChatGPT-maker said its early policy ideas aim to prompt discussions about action needed as AI systems become more capable.

item.title: Singapore stocks falter amid US-Iran stand-off; STI down 0.3%
item.description: [Straits Times] Across the broader market, gainers beat decliners 218 to 206, with 1.1 billion securities changing hands.

item.title: 氪星晚报｜潘兴广场拟94亿欧元现金加股票收购环球音乐集团；高盛策略师：当前科技股估值带来投资机会；中国央行连续第17个月增持黄金
item.description: [36氪] 大公司： 产业链人士：苹果首款折叠屏手机项目正常推进，产品下半年发布 4月6日，有媒体报道，富士康正在试产苹果首款折叠屏手机。对此，4月7日，苹果产业链人士向记者表示，苹果首款折叠屏手机项目方案早已确定，目前该项目正在正常推进中，试产是产品正式量产前必经阶段，一般需经过工程验证、设计验证、生产试产验证，最后再到正式量产，按正常推进计划，该产品将于今年秋季发布。（证券时报） 名创优品：预计2026年底将开设200家“乐园系”门店 36氪获悉，截至4月7日，名创优品已在全球落地65家“乐园系”门店，涵盖MINISO SPACE、MINISO FRIENDS、MINISO LAND、

item.title: Former Cathay cinema operator gets 4-month extension for debt moratorium
item.description: [Straits Times] A previous plan to raise S$14 million via a placement of 1.9 billion shares had fallen through.

item.title: Gemini is making it faster for distressed users to reach mental health resources
item.description: [The Verge AI] Google says it has updated Gemini to better direct users to get mental health resources during moments of crisis. The change comes as the tech giant faces a wrongful death lawsuit alleging its chatbot "coached" a man to die by suicide, the latest in a string of lawsuits alleging tangible harm from A

item.title: 电商评价区，上演AI鉴别大赛
item.description: [钛媒体] 交易环节有真人吗？

item.title: AI的订阅制，被Agent用崩了
item.description: [钛媒体] 大家一直在讲“让AI替人工作”，真有人这么干了，平台先受不了了。

item.title: 第一批用AI的人，已经染上了AI疲惫症
item.description: [钛媒体] AI带来的是解放还是一台加速运转的跑步机

item.title: 炸穿硅谷！270页文件曝光OpenAI绝密黑料，撕开AI巨头资本权力暗战
item.description: [钛媒体] 70 页绝密备忘录、200 页内部笔记接连曝光，直指 Sam Altman 撒谎成性。全人类正在被动卷入一场赌局。

item.title: 36氪首发 | 钠电正极材料厂商完成数千万元融资，千吨级产能将进一步扩展
item.description: [36氪] 作者 | 乔钰杰 编辑 | 袁斯来 硬氪获悉，兴荣新源（厦门）科技有限公司（以下简称“兴荣新源”）近日完成了数千万元天使轮融资，由蓝图创投和厦门高新投共同投资，融资资金将主要用于研发投入及扩大产能。 兴荣新源成立于2022年，总部位于厦门市，致力于钠离子电池正极材料的研发、生产和销售，公司围绕复合磷酸铁钠（NFPP）技术路线，构建了系统化的材料设计与工艺能力。 兴荣新源的技术优势主要体现在材料设计与工艺创新上，公司采用独有的复合碳包覆技术，显著提升了NFPP材料的电子导电性；通过配方体系优化与精细化工艺控制，抑制了杂相生成，进一步提升了材

item.title: 早期项目 | 前苹果员工做了只AI“肩上宠物”，奇绩创坛孵化，要切年轻人潮玩市场
item.description: [36氪] 作者 | 乔钰杰 编辑 | 袁斯来 当下市面上的AI陪伴玩具大多围绕儿童与老年人设计，而Blinkko则从一开始就将目标人群指向年轻人。 相比通过语言交流建立陪伴关系，创始人沈彤欣却告诉硬氪：“我们不相信AI真的能陪伴人。” 基于这样的判断，这个获得奇绩创坛投资的早期团队，做出了一只“趴在肩上的宠物”。 如果只把它当作一个AI陪伴玩具，这个项目很容易被误解——它的核心不在于填补独处时的空白，而在于成为一种可以被带入真实场景的“社交信号”。 这一尝试来自一个年轻团队：创始人沈彤欣曾在苹果负责员工体验，擅长通过设计连接人与场景；硬件负

item.title: China is winning one AI race, the US another - but either might pull ahead
item.description: [BBC Technology] Both sides don't want to let their rival dominate. And the competition may yet be transformed further.

item.title: 红熊AI完成2.1亿元A轮融资，切入物理AI赛道｜36氪首发
item.description: [36氪] 36氪获悉，企业级AI解决方案供应商「红熊AI」已于近日完成 2.1亿元A轮融资，投后估值超15亿元。本轮由华禹创投领投，老股东格睿丰投资、稼沃资本跟投，徐汇资本、上汽美元基金、嘉铭浩春、誉华资产等多家机构参与投资，三位创始团队成员也以本轮估值跟投约3000万元。这已是华禹创投连续第四轮押注红熊AI。  成立于2024年4月7日的红熊AI，主打“记忆科学+全模态大模型”技术路线，致力于让 AI 具备类似人类的"情节记忆"能力，从而在物理世界实现更精准的感知、决策与行动。创始人兼CEO温德亮向 36 氪透露红熊AI预计于2027年2-3季度向港交所递表、2028

item.title: 36氪首发 | 领跑全彩AR微显示屏产品化落地，赛富乐斯完成3亿元C轮融资
item.description: [36氪] 作者丨欧雪 编辑丨袁斯来 硬氪获悉，AR显示技术企业——赛富乐斯近日已完成3亿元C轮融资。本轮投资方包括西安西高投繁星投资基金、无锡市梁溪科创产业投资二期基金、安徽金安产业引导基金、上海吉六零山海松金创业投资基金、西安财金龙门成长股权投资合伙企业、西安市人才发展基金等多家机构。资金将主要用于加速AR用全彩微显示屏的量产交付。 赛富乐斯成立于2017年，是一家从耶鲁大学实验室走出的光电半导体企业。公司基于多项原创技术，聚焦Micro-LED显示赛道，构建了覆盖AR微显示与XR大屏两大场景的产品矩阵，并持续推进规模商业化。 团队方面，公司创始人兼CEO陈辰拥有清华机械工程本科、哈佛

item.title: How China fell for a lobster: What an AI assistant tells us about Beijing's ambition
item.description: [BBC Technology] The AI agent sparked a frenzy of "raising lobsters" in March, with users training the tool to suit their needs.

item.title: Apple at 50: Three products that changed how we live - and three that really didn't
item.description: [BBC Technology] On the tech giant's 50th year, we ask analysts to give their top three Apple successes and misses

item.title: Hackers Are Posting the Claude Code Leak With Bonus Malware
item.description: [WIRED AI] Plus: The FBI says a recent hack of its wiretap tools poses a national security risk, attackers stole Cisco source code as part of an ongoing supply chain hacking spree, and more.

item.title: Nasa astronauts reach safe orbit in historic moon mission
item.description: [Business Times] [AUSTIN] Nasa’s crew of astronauts launched to space and reached a stable orbit, kicking off a landmark journey that will take them...

item.title: Broadcom signs long-term deal to develop Google’s custom AI chips
item.description: [Business Times] Demand for custom chips has surged in recent years

item.title: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google unite to combat model copying in China
item.description: [Business Times] Trump administration officials have signalled their openness to fostering information sharing among AI companies to rein in adversarial distillation

item.title: Businesses scramble to get noticed by AI search
item.description: [BBC Technology] Firms are changing the way they present information on their websites, so they get noticed by AI.

item.title: Iran threatens OpenAI’s Stargate data center in Abu Dhabi
item.description: [The Verge AI] Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) has published a video threatening OpenAI's planned Abu Dhabi data center if the US follows through on threats to attack the country's power plants, as reported earlier by Tom's Hardware. The video, which was published to an Iranian state-backed news ou

item.title: AI and empathy define the next era of marketing systems
item.description: [MarTech] The real opportunity with AI is not scale alone, but designing experiences that reduce friction and support both customers and teams. The post AI and empathy define the next era of marketing systems appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: Three first-party data strategies retail brands are prioritizing now
item.description: [MarTech] As 3rd-party cookies fade, mid-market retailers are leaning on direct value exchanges, ID-driven experiences and zero-party signals to rebuild their data. The post Three first-party data strategies retail brands are prioritizing now appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: Why AI-driven creative is failing and how to fix it
item.description: [MarTech] From Coca-Cola to Svedka, poor execution is undermining AI-driven creative. Learn how to use genAI in ways that support storytelling. The post Why AI-driven creative is failing and how to fix it appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: AI adoption fails at the human level
item.description: [MarTech] The biggest blocker to AI isn’t technology. It’s fear, risk perception and past experience. Here’s how to address what’s really holding teams back. The post AI adoption fails at the human level appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: The Ridiculously Nerdy Intel Bet That Could Rake in Billions
item.description: [WIRED AI] Advanced chip packaging is suddenly at the center of the AI boom. Intel is going all in.

item.title: Meta Pauses Work With Mercor After Data Breach Puts AI Industry Secrets at Risk
item.description: [WIRED AI] Major AI labs are investigating a security incident that impacted Mercor, a leading data vendor. The incident could have exposed key data about how they train AI models.

item.title: OpenAI’s Fidji Simo Is Taking Medical Leave Amid an Executive Shake-Up
item.description: [WIRED AI] The company is undergoing major leadership restructuring as its CEO of AGI deployment goes on leave for “several weeks.”

item.title: The 3 Best Portable Jump Starters in 2026: Get Charged Up
item.description: [WIRED AI] The new crop of portable jump starters means you'll never be stuck waiting on a tow. Here are the devices we'd trust.
